name: Strawberry Angel Shortcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sliced strawberries, sugar, and 1 tablespoon rum or 1 teaspoon rum extract in a medium bowl.
2. In a small measuring cup, combine the remaining rum or extract and orange juice.
3. Melt chocolate slowly over hot water in a double boiler or small bowl, stirring occasionally until cooled to room temperature.
4. Beat whipping cream and cooled chocolate mixture until soft peaks form.
5. Slice angel cake horizontally into three layers and place one layer on a large cake plate.
6. Drizzle with 1/3 of the orange juice mixture.
7. Top with 1/3 of the cream-chocolate mixture and 1/2 of the sliced berries.
8. Repeat layers, ending with cream spooned over the top of the cake and partially down the sides.
9. Garnish with whole strawberries and mint leaves.
10. Refrigerate for 1 to 2 hours before serving.
- Cut into 8 wedges.
